archetype: 1 - Organic & Earthy (Customized for Artisanal Chocolate Brand)

fonts.usage: Headings (H1, H2, H3), Logos, Emphasized Metrics
Body text, Tables, UI Elements, Input Fields, Badges

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-serif font-bold tracking-tight text-[#3E2723]
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-serif font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#3E2723]
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-sans uppercase tracking-[0.1em] font-semibold text-[#8B5A3C]

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-6, p-8), 'Control Room Grid' for dashboard analytics, 'Bento Grid' for overview.

surface_strategy.dashboard_cards: bg-[#FFFDF8] border border-[#8B5A3C]/15 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
surface_strategy.header: bg-[#F5E6D3]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#8B5A3C]/15 sticky top-0 z-40

buttons.primary: bg-[#6B4423] text-[#F5E6D3] hover:bg-[#8B5A3C] transition-colors font-medium rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-[#E8D5C4] text-[#3E2723] hover:bg-[#D4BC9A] transition-colors font-medium rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#6B4423] text-[#6B4423] hover:bg-[#6B4423] hover:text-[#F5E6D3] transition-colors font-medium rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5

components.inputs: bg-[#FFFDF8] border border-[#8B5A3C]/30 focus:border-[#6B4423] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#6B4423] rounded-lg text-[#3E2723] placeholder:text-[#9A8476] transition-all
components.tables: w-full text-left text-sm text-[#4A3B32] bg-[#FFFDF8] rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm border border-[#8B5A3C]/15. Header rows bg-[#E8D5C4] text-[#3E2723]. Row hover bg-[#F5E6D3]/50.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight. High-end, precise styling suitable for artisanal brands.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons translate-y-[-1px] and increase shadow. List items change background color slightly.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade-in with slight upward motion (translate-y-2) on initial render.
motion_and_interactions.staggered_lists: List items or dashboard cards should enter sequentially with 50ms delay.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text on background. Primary text (#3E2723) on Beige (#F5E6D3) passes easily.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements, forms, navigation links, and action buttons MUST have a descriptive 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `@phosphor-icons/react` for elegant, thin-line icons suitable for an artisanal brand.
Add 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' fonts to index.css or via Google Fonts link.
Ensure all `.js` and `.jsx` components use standard Tailwind utility classes.
Do NOT use pure white `#FFFFFF` for backgrounds; use `#FFFDF8` to maintain the warm artisanal feel.
Implement a dashboard structure with a dark sidebar (`bg-[#3E2723]`) and a warm page background (`bg-[#F5E6D3]`).
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural bento-grids, and deeply customized Shadcn components for forms, tables, and dialogs.
Build modules for: Dashboard, Clientes, Pedidos, Produção, Estoque, Vendas/NFC-e.
Embed the login page background using the 'login_abstract' image provided in the media section.
Apply `data-testid` to EVERY interactive element (buttons, inputs, links, tabs).
